arts.ttl: The day Real Madrid fans sang You'll Never Walk Alone
arts.sum: Ahead of the game, the Reds had placed a bouquet of flowers in the area where Madrid fans were seated as a tribute to Amancio Amaro, a former star of the Spanish club who had recently passed away. Back in early 2023, Liverpool and Real Madrid met at Anfield for the first leg of the Champions League round of 16.

arts.ttl: 'Minds scrambled' - National media spot Man City reaction to Feyenoord collapse before Liverpool

arts.ttl: Defeat at Liverpool would likely end Man City’s title hopes – Ilkay Gundogan
arts.sum: City travel to Anfield on the back of another demoralising result.

arts.ttl: William Saliba sends Arsenal rallying cry and warns Liverpool they've turned a corner
arts.sum: William Saliba believes Arsenal are coming back towards their best form but insisted the only real proof is to keep on winning as they face another tough trip to West Ham on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool must act on Salah situation - Sutton

arts.ttl: Andy Robertson makes 'revenge' admission before Liverpool's Real Madrid clash
